                variant="ghost"

input.newString:
<Button
                variant="ghost"
                size="sm"
                onClick={() => {
                  try {
                    disconnect()
                  } catch (error) {
                    console.error('Disconnect error:', error)
                    toast.error('Failed to disconnect wallet')
                  }
                }}
                className="h-7 text-xs px-2"
              >
                {address?.slice(0, 6)}...{address?.slice(-4)}
              </Button>
